textByHash.cb015e66e535c35089b4d12264902b2d3c42fd2a: Hello there. I'd be careful of upsetting the gryphons in here. These ones so far don't seem to be too aggressive. We'd prefer to keep it that way.
textByHash.41960e87e7fd2a6bc14fb18b075f87abe9b405db: You can, but only if you have permission. We still want to keep them in check, but we don't want to go overboard and make them angry.
textByHash.1844ad7a4c9de98f3639c60710caaec211142971: Wait! These gryphons do not currently pose a threat to us. You shouldn't attack them without permission!
